next_atomic_task: Verify the npm package evidence and ask for the GitHub release command.
last_completed_evidence: Package publish completed after maintainer-provided two-factor authentication.
Published package version was visible through npm metadata.
known_blockers: GitHub release has not been created yet.
scope_guard: Do not claim released until both npm and GitHub release evidence exist.
Do not create a GitHub release without explicit maintainer confirmation.
Do not make unrelated docs or runtime changes while the release is partial.

stop_conditions: published package metadata does not match the intended release
GitHub release already exists with unexpected metadata
maintainer has not confirmed release creation
release_lifecycle.allowed_next_action: Record npm evidence, then request explicit confirmation for GitHub release creation.
